question: A user reports ke internet kaam nahi kar raha. Aap kaise troubleshoot karenge?
answer:
Sir, main step-by-step troubleshooting follow karunga. 
Sabse pehle main physical connections check karunga, jaise Ethernet cable properly lagi hai ya WiFi connected hai ya nahi.
Uske baad main IP configuration check karunga using commands like ipconfig ya ifconfig.
Phir main connectivity test karunga by pinging:
1. localhost (127.0.0.1) 
2. default gateway 
3. external IP like 8.8.8.8 
 Agar external IP ping ho rahi ho lekin websites open na ho rahi hon, toh mujhe DNS issue ka doubt hoga. Phir main DNS settings check karunga ya nslookup use karunga. 
Last mein, agar zarurat ho toh network adapter ya router restart karunga.

question: System IP address ko ping kar raha hai lekin websites open nahi ho rahi. Issue kya ho sakta hai?
answer:
Sir, yeh usually DNS issue hota hai. 
Matlab system network tak toh pahunch raha hai, lekin domain names ko IP address mein resolve nahi kar paa raha. 
Main DNS configuration check karunga, nslookup se test karunga, aur DNS cache flush karunga. Agar issue solve na ho, toh main Google DNS (8.8.8.8) use karne ka try karunga.

question: OOP kya hota hai?
answer:
Sir, Object-Oriented Programming ek programming paradigm hai jo objects aur classes par based hota hai. 
Iske main principles hain: 
1. Encapsulation: Data aur methods ko ek saath wrap karna 
2. Inheritance: Parent class se code reuse karna 
3. Polymorphism: Same function ka different behavior 
4. Abstraction: Implementation details hide karna 
Yeh code ko modular, maintainable aur scalable banata hai.

question: API kya hoti hai?
answer:
Sir, API (Application Programming Interface) ek medium hota hai jiske through different software systems ek doosre se communicate karte hain. 
Jaise frontend jab backend se data leta hai, woh API ke through request karta hai. 
APIs web development, mobile apps aur integrations mein bohat use hoti hain.

question: Docker kya hai aur kyun use hota hai?
answer:
Sir, Docker ek containerization platform hai jo application aur uski dependencies ko ek container mein package karta hai. 
Iska faida yeh hai ke application har environment mein same tarah se run karta hai. 
Containers lightweight hote hain aur fast start hote hain, is liye deployment aur DevOps mein widely use hote hain.

question: Virtual Machine aur Docker container mein kya difference hai?
answer:
Sir, Virtual Machine mein poora operating system hota hai aur woh hypervisor par run hoti hai, is liye heavy hoti hai. 
Jab ke Docker containers host OS ka kernel share karte hain aur sirf required dependencies rakhte hain, is liye lightweight aur fast hote hain.

question: Git kya hai aur important kyun hai?
answer:
Sir, Git ek distributed version control system hai jo code changes ko track karta hai. 
Yeh developers ko collaboration mein help karta hai, project ka history maintain karta hai aur multiple versions manage karne mein madad deta hai.

question: Agar server suddenly down ho jaye toh aap kya karenge?
answer:
Sir, sabse pehle main check karunga ke server reachable hai ya nahi using ping ya remote access. 
Phir main system logs aur running services check karunga issue identify karne ke liye. Agar koi service down ho toh main usay restart karunga. 
Agar issue complex ho, toh main logs collect karke escalate karunga. 
Main bina soche samjhe reboot nahi karunga, balki proper troubleshooting follow karunga.

question: Aap yeh job kyun chahte hain?
answer:
Sir, mujhe yeh role is liye pasand hai kyunki yeh meri skills—networking, system support aur tools jaise Docker aur Git—se match karta hai. 
Mujhe technical problems solve karna pasand hai aur main aise environment mein kaam karna chahta hoon jahan systems reliable aur efficient hon. 
Mujhe lagta hai main is role mein achha contribute kar sakta hoon aur saath hi seekhne ka bhi moka milega.

question: Introduce yourself!
answer:
My name is Muneer Ahmed Khan, and I am from Mianwali. I have completed my Matriculation from Jinnah Public High School Sawans, followed by my Intermediate from Punjab Group of Colleges. I recently completed my BS in Information Technology from the University of Mianwali. 
 Currently, I am working as an online web developer, where I build and manage web-based applications. Alongside this, I also have experience working as a Computer Instructor, where I teach basic computing and IT-related subjects. 
I am very interested in the System Support Officer position, as it aligns with my technical background and problem-solving skills, especially in areas like networking, troubleshooting, and system support.

question: Explain basic Git workflow
answer:
A typical Git workflow includes: 
git clone to copy a repository 
git add to stage changes 
git commit to save changes locally 
git push to upload changes to remote repository 
git pull to update local code 
This workflow helps maintain proper version control and collaboration.

question: System “No IP Address” show kar raha hai. Aap kya karenge?
answer:
Sir, sabse pehle main check karunga ke DHCP enabled hai ya nahi. 
Phir main ipconfig /release aur ipconfig /renew run karke new IP request karunga. 
Agar issue solve na ho, toh main DHCP server availability, network cable ya WiFi connection check karunga. 
Testing ke liye main temporary static IP bhi assign kar sakta hoon.

question: Do systems mein IP conflict aa raha hai. Kaise resolve karenge?
answer:
Sir, yeh tab hota hai jab do devices same IP use kar rahe hote hain. 
Main dono systems identify karke ek ko different IP assign karunga ya DHCP par shift karunga. 
Saath hi DHCP server bhi check karunga ke duplicate IP assign na kar raha ho.

question: User WiFi se connected hai lekin internet nahi chal raha. Kya karenge?
answer:
Sir, pehle main check karunga ke valid IP assign hua hai ya nahi. 
Phir gateway aur external IP ko ping karunga. 
Agar gateway ping ho raha hai lekin internet nahi chal raha, toh main router ya ISP issue check karunga aur DNS settings verify karunga.

question: User shared folder access nahi kar paa raha. Kya check karenge?
answer:
Sir, pehle main ping karke connectivity check karunga. 
Phir sharing permissions, firewall settings aur dono systems same network par hain ya nahi, yeh verify karunga. 
Saath hi file sharing enabled hai ya nahi, yeh bhi check karunga.

question: Office mein network slow hai. Aap kya karenge?
answer:
Sir, main bandwidth usage check karunga aur heavy traffic ya downloads identify karunga. 
Phir ping se latency test karunga. 
Main switches aur routers bhi check karunga aur agar zarurat ho toh malware scan bhi karunga.

question: System default gateway ko ping nahi kar raha. Kya karenge?
answer:
Sir, main IP configuration aur subnet mask check karunga. 
Phir physical connection ya WiFi verify karunga. 
Agar issue rahe, toh router status check karunga ya kisi aur device se test karunga.

question: Sirf ek website open nahi ho rahi. Issue kya ho sakta hai?
answer:
Sir, main check karunga ke website globally down toh nahi hai. 
Phir browser cache clear aur DNS flush karunga. 
Main dusre device ya network se bhi try karunga confirm karne ke liye.

question: VPN connect nahi ho raha. Aap kya karenge?
answer:
Sir, sabse pehle internet connectivity check karunga. 
Phir VPN credentials aur server address verify karunga. 
Firewall settings aur required ports bhi check karunga.

question: Network printer kaam nahi kar raha. Kya check karenge?
answer:
Sir, main check karunga ke printer on hai aur network se connected hai. 
Phir printer IP ping karunga. 
Drivers aur sharing settings bhi verify karunga.

question: User ko baar baar disconnection ho raha hai. Kya karenge?
answer:
Sir, main WiFi signal strength, cable condition aur network adapter check karunga. 
Saath hi IP conflicts ya router issues bhi verify karunga.

question: Ping response bohat high aa raha hai. Kya reason ho sakta hai?
answer:
Sir, yeh network congestion ya routing issue ho sakta hai. 
Main bandwidth usage check karunga, traceroute run karunga aur network devices inspect karunga

question: User internal server access nahi kar paa raha. Kya karenge?
answer:
Sir, main ping karke server reachability check karunga. 
Phir firewall rules aur user permissions verify karunga. 
Saath hi check karunga ke server services running hain ya nahi.

question: Office ke devices aapas mein communicate nahi kar rahe. Kya issue ho sakta hai?
answer:
Sir, main IP aur subnet mask check karunga. 
Agar devices different subnet mein hain, toh configuration correct karunga ya proper routing setup karunga.

question: Sab users ko achanak IP milna band ho gaya. Kya karenge?
answer:
Sir, yeh DHCP server issue ho sakta hai. 
Main DHCP service check aur restart karunga. 
Temporary solution ke liye static IP assign kar sakta hoon.

question: Application network par kaam nahi kar rahi. Kya karenge?
answer:
Sir, main firewall settings check karunga aur testing ke liye temporarily disable karunga. 
Agar issue confirm ho jaye, toh required ports allow karunga.

question: System DNS error show kar raha hai. Kya karenge?
answer:
Sir, main DNS configuration check karunga aur nslookup se test karunga. 
Agar zarurat ho, toh alternate DNS server use karunga.

question: Network unstable ho gaya hai. Kya reason ho sakta hai?
answer:
Sir, yeh network loop ho sakta hai. 
Main switch connections check karunga aur redundant paths disable karunga.

question: Switch ka ek port kaam nahi kar raha. Kya karenge?
answer:
Sir, main dusra cable ya device use karke test karunga. 
Phir switch configuration aur port status check karunga.

question: User emails receive kar raha hai lekin send nahi kar paa raha. Kya karenge?
answer:
Sir, main SMTP settings, ports aur firewall restrictions check karunga. 
Saath hi authentication settings verify karunga.

question: Remote Desktop kaam nahi kar raha. Kya check karenge?
answer:
Sir, main check karunga ke RDP enabled hai ya nahi, IP address verify karunga aur port 3389 open hai ya nahi. 
Firewall aur network connectivity bhi check karunga.

question: Aap ek new employee ke liye computer system kaise install aur configure karenge?
answer:
Sir, sabse pehle main organization ke standards ke mutabiq operating system install karunga. 
Uske baad required software install karunga jaise office tools, antivirus aur department-specific applications. 
Phir main network settings configure karunga, agar zarurat ho toh system ko domain mein join karunga aur security policies apply karunga. 
Finally, main system ko properly test karunga taake sab kuch smoothly kaam kare, aur uske baad user ko handover karunga.

question: User complain karta hai ke system bohat slow hai. Aap kya karenge?
answer:
Sir, sabse pehle main system resources check karunga jaise CPU, RAM aur disk usage. 
Phir main unnecessary background applications ya malware check karunga. 
Main software updates, disk space aur possible hardware issues bhi verify karunga. 
Findings ke basis par main unnecessary programs remove karunga, system update karunga ya zarurat ho toh hardware upgrade suggest karunga.

question: Aap organization mein smooth network operation kaise ensure karte hain?
answer:
Sir, main regularly network performance monitor karta hoon, aur routers aur switches jaise devices ko check karta hoon. 
Main ensure karta hoon ke sab systems ki IP configuration sahi ho. 
Saath hi routine maintenance karta hoon, firmware updates apply karta hoon aur connectivity issues ko quickly resolve karta hoon taake downtime kam se kam ho.

question: Aap systems aur data ko secure karne ke liye kya steps lenge?
answer:
Sir, main sab systems par antivirus aur firewall implement karunga, aur regular updates aur patches ensure karunga. 
Strong password policies enforce karunga. 
Main unauthorized access restrict karunga, regular backups maintain karunga aur users ko security risks jaise phishing attacks ke baare mein educate karunga.

question: Aap software-related issues ko kaise handle karte hain?
answer:
Sir, sabse pehle main issue ko samajhne ki koshish karta hoon, error aur user actions analyze karta hoon. 
Phir main troubleshooting karta hoon jaise logs check karna, software reinstall ya update karna. 
Agar issue solve na ho, toh main usay relevant team ya vendor ko escalate karta hoon, aur ensure karta hoon ke user ka kaam minimum disturb ho.

question: Aap PERA mein System Support Officer kyun join karna chahte hain?
answer:
Sir, main PERA join karna chahta hoon kyunki yeh ek professional organization hai jahan technology aur system reliability bohat important hai. 
Mujhe lagta hai yeh role meri technical skills aur IT support aur networking ke interest se perfectly match karta hai. 
Main aise environment mein kaam karna chahta hoon jahan main professionally grow kar sakoon, organization ki efficiency mein contribute kar sakoon aur responsibility ke saath kaam kar sakoon.

question: Aapki strengths kya hain?
answer:
Sir, meri main strengths problem-solving, quick learning aur troubleshooting ke waqt patience maintain karna hain. 
Main technical issues ko panic karne ke bajaye step-by-step handle karna pasand karta hoon. 
Main team environment mein bhi achha kaam karta hoon aur technical issues ko clear aur professional way mein communicate karne ki koshish karta hoon.

question: Aapki weakness kya hai?
answer:
Sir, maine yeh notice kiya hai ke kabhi kabhi main har cheez ko perfect banane mein extra time spend kar deta hoon. 
Lekin main apni time management skills improve kar raha hoon aur seekh raha hoon ke quality aur efficiency ke darmiyan balance kaise maintain kiya jaye.

question: Aap khud ko aglay 5 saalon mein kahan dekhte hain?
answer:
Sir, aglay 5 saalon mein main khud ko ek skilled IT professional ke taur par dekhna chahta hoon jise system administration, networking aur infrastructure support ka strong experience ho. 
Main advanced technologies seekhna chahta hoon aur organization mein zyada responsibilities handle karna chahta hoon.

question: Aap PERA ke bare mein kya jante hain?
answer:
Sir, PERA ka full form Punjab Enforcement and Regulatory Authority hai. Yeh Government of Punjab ne Punjab Enforcement and Regulation Act 2024 ke under establish kiya hai. 
Iska main purpose inflation control, encroachments, market regulation aur public welfare se related laws ko effectively enforce karna hai. 
PERA ka aim transparency, regulatory compliance aur modern enforcement system ko improve karna hai poore Punjab mein. 
Is authority ki chairperson Chief Minister Punjab Maryam Nawaz Sharif hain, jabke Capt. Farrukh Atiq Khan Director General ke taur par serve kar rahe hain. 
Mujhe lagta hai ke PERA Punjab mein law enforcement aur public service ko modern aur efficient banane ke liye ek important initiative hai.

question: Who is the current President of Pakistan, Prime Minister of Pakistan, Chief of Army Staff, Inspector General of Punjab Police, Director General of PERA, and Inspector General of Islamabad Police?
answer:
• President of Pakistan: Asif Ali Zardari
• Prime Minister of Pakistan: Shehbaz Sharif
• Chief of Army Staff: General Asim Munir
• Inspector General Punjab Police: Dr. Usman Anwar
• Director General PERA: Capt. Farrukh Atiq Khan
• Inspector General Islamabad Police: Ali Nasir Rizvi

question: Virtual DOM kya hai, aur React ise kaise use karta hai?
answer:
Virtual DOM asli DOM ka ek lightweight, in-memory copy ya blueprint hota hai. Jab bhi aapke component ka state change hota hai, React directly real HTML DOM ko update nahi karta. Wo pehle 'Virtual DOM' ko update karta hai.
Iske baad React ek Diffing Algorithm ka use karke purane aur naye Virtual DOM ko compare karta hai. Is process ko Reconciliation kehte hain. Isse React ko pata chal jata hai ki exactly kis jagah change hua hai, aur wo sirf usi specific part ko real DOM me update karta hai, jisse UI Rendering bahut fast ho jati hai.

question: State aur Props me kya difference hai?
answer:
Props: Ye 'Properties' ka short form hai. Ye read-only data hote hain jo ek Parent Component se Child Component me pass kiye jate hain. Props immutable hote hain, matlab Child Component inhe khud change nahi kar sakta.

State: Ye ek component ka local aur mutable data hota hai. Ise component khud manage aur update karta hai. Jab bhi State ki value change hoti hai, React us component ko automatically re-render kar deta hai taaki screen par naya data dikh sake.

question: React Hooks use karne ke kya Rules hain?
answer:
Answer: React Hooks (jaise useState, useEffect) use karne ke 2 sabse important rules hain:

1. Only call Hooks at the top level: Hooks ko kabhi bhi loops, conditions (if/else), ya nested functions ke andar call nahi karna chahiye. Ye hamesha aapke component ke top level par hone chahiye taaki har render me ye sahi order me run hon. 

2. Only call Hooks from React Functions: Hooks ko aap sirf React Functional Components ya Custom Hooks ke andar hi call kar sakte hain, kisi regular JavaScript function me nahi.

question: Node.js ko Single-Threaded kyun kaha jata hai, aur ye Concurrency kaise handle karta hai?
answer:
Node.js apne main JavaScript code ko run karne ke liye sirf ek hi main thread (Single Thread) ka use karta hai. Lekin multiple requests ko ek saath (Concurrency) handle karne ke liye ye Event Loop aur Non-blocking I/O ka use karta hai.

Jab bhi koi bhari kaam aata hai (jaise File Read karna ya Database Query), Node.js use background threads (libuv thread pool) ya OS ko saump deta hai aur khud agli request lene ke liye free ho jata hai. Jab wo kaam pura ho jata hai, to Callback ke zariye main thread ko result mil jata hai. Is wajah se ye hazaron connections ek saath bina block hue handle kar leta hai.

question: require() aur import me kya difference hai?
answer:
require(): Ye CommonJS (CJS) module system ka hissa hai. Ye synchronous hota hai aur traditional Node.js me default roop se use hota aaya hai.

import: Ye ES6 Modules (ESM) ka hissa hai. Ye asynchronous hota hai aur modern JavaScript ka standard hai. Ise Node.js me use karne ke liye aapko package.json me 'type': 'module' set karna padta hai.

question: 'Callback Hell' kya hai aur ise kaise thik karte hain?
answer:
Jab hum bahut sare asynchronous operations ko ek ke andar ek nest (chain) kar dete hain, to code bahut zyada complex aur unreadable ho jata hai. Ise hi Callback Hell ya Pyramid of Doom kehte hain.

Ise thik karne ke liye hum Promises (using .then()) ya phir modern async/await syntax ka use karte hain, jisse hamara code bilkul seedha aur saaf (synchronous-like) dikhne lagta hai.

question: PHP me GET and POST Methods me kya difference hai?
answer:
GET: Is method me data URL ke saath attach hokar jata hai, isliye ye browser ki history aur URL bar me sabko dikhta hai. Ye sensitive data (jaise password) ke liye safe nahi hai. Iski data limit (around 2000 characters) hoti hai, aur ise cache ya bookmark kiya ja sakta hai.

POST: Is method me data HTTP request ki body ke andar chupkar jata hai, isliye ye URL me nahi dikhta. Ye secure hota hai aur forms ya password submission ke liye best hai. Iski koi fixed data limit nahi hoti aur ye file upload bhi support karta hai.

question: PHP me Sessions aur Cookies me kya difference hai?
answer:
Cookies: Ye user ke Client-side (yani browser) par store hoti hain. Kyunki ye user ke computer par hoti hain, inhe user dekh bhi sakta hai aur modify (tamper) bhi kar sakta hai, isliye ye kam secure hoti hain.

Sessions: Ye Server-side par store hoti hain. PHP har user ke liye ek unique Session ID banata hai aur use browser me cookie ke roop me save kar deta hai. Saara actual data server par safe rehta hai, isliye sessions zyada secure hote hain.

question: PHP me SQL Injection attacks ko kaise rokte hain?
answer:
User se aaye data ko kabhi bhi directly SQL query ki string me concatenate ( jodhna ) nahi chahiye. SQL Injection se bachne ka sabse best aur modern tareeka hai PDO (PHP Data Objects) ya MySQLi ke saath Prepared Statements ka use karna.

Prepared Statements data aur SQL query ko alag-alag rakhte hain, jisse user input kabhi bhi database me code ki tarah execute nahi ho pata.

question: PHP me include aur require me main difference kya hai?
answer:
Dono ka basic kaam same hai—kisi doosri PHP file ka code current file me insert karna. Lekin main difference Error Handling me hai:

include: Agar specified file nahi milti (missed ya delete ho gayi hai), to ye ek Warning (E_WARNING) deta hai. Lekin aapka script ruka nahi hai—code ka execution aage chalta rehta hai.

require: Agar file nahi milti, to ye ek Fatal Error (E_COMPILE_ERROR) throw karta hai. Iske baad script ka execution wahin ruk jata hai (stop ho jata hai) aur aage ka koi code run nahi hota.


Rule of Thumb: Agar file application ke liye critical hai (jaise database configuration file), to require use karein. Agar sirf footer ya sidebar hai jiske bina bhi site chal sakti hai, to include use karein.

question: include_once aur require_once kya hote hain, aur inhe kab use karna chahiye?
answer:
_once ka matlab hai ki PHP pehle check karega ki kya wo file pehle se include ho chuki hai ya nahi. Agar ho chuki hai, to wo use dubara include nahi karega.

Agar aap galti se same file ko do baar include ya require kar dete hain, aur us file me koi function ya class defined hai, to PHP 'Fatal error: Cannot redeclare function...' ka error de dega.

include_once aur require_once isi error se bachate hain. Inhe tab use karna chahiye jab aap functions, classes, ya global configuration files load kar rahe hon, taaki duplicate loading na ho.

question: Performance ke maamle me require behtar hai ya require_once?
answer:
Performance ke maamle me require thoda sa faster hota hai compare to require_once.

Kyunki require_once ko har baar back-end par ek internal lookup table check karni padti hai ki 'Kya yeh file pehle load hui thi?'. Agar aapka framework ya code structure achha hai aur aapko pata hai ki file dubara load nahi hogi, to simple require use karna zyada efficient hota hai.

question: React me Component Lifecycle Methods kya hote hain, aur Functional Components me inhe kaise handle kiya jata hai?
answer:
Class Components me lifecycle methods hote the jo component ke alag-alag stages par run hote hain—jaise birth (Mounting), growth (Updating), aur death (Unmounting).

componentDidMount (jab component screen par pehli baar aata hai).
componentDidUpdate (jab state ya props change hote hain).
componentWillUnmount (jab component screen se hatata hai).

question: React me Context API kya hai, aur ye Redux se kaise alag hai?
answer:
Context API: Ye React ka ek built-in feature hai jo hume global data (jaise Themes, User Authentication state) bina 'Props Drilling' (har ek layer se props pass karna) ke deep-nested components tak directly pahunchane me madad karta hai. Ye small to medium apps ke liye best hai.

Redux: Ye ek third-party library hai jo advanced state management ke liye use hoti hai. Redux me ek single global Store hota hai, aur state ko modify karne ke liye Actions aur Reducers ka use hota hai. Redux badhe aur complex applications ke liye behtar hai kyunki ye strict unidirectional data flow aur behtar debugging tools (Redux DevTools) deta hai.

question: React.memo aur useMemo me kya difference hai?
answer:
Dono ka kaam application ki performance ko optimize karna hai (unnecessary re-renders ko rok kar), lekin dono ka use-case alag hai:

React.memo: Ye ek Higher-Order Component (HOC) hai. Ye poore component ko wrap karta hai. Agar component ke props change nahi hue hain, to ye use re-render hone se bacha leta hai.

useMemo: Ye ek Hook hai. Ye kisi component ke andar kisi heavy ya complex calculation/function ke result ko memoize (cache) karne ke liye use hota hai, taaki wo calculation har render par dubara na chale.

question: Node.js me Streams aur Buffer me kya difference hai?
answer:
Dono hi data handling ke tarike hain jab hum badi files ya network requests ke sath kaam karte hain:

Buffer: Ye memory (RAM) me ek temporary storage space hai. Node.js puri file ka data ek sath uthakar buffer me dalta hai aur phir use process karta है. Agar file 2GB ki hai, to ye 2GB RAM consume karega, jo server crash kar sakta hai.

Streams: Ye data ko chhote-chhote pieces (chunks) me process karta hai, bina puri file ko ek sath memory me load kiye. Jaise YouTube par video puri download nahi hoti, chunks me stream hoti hai. Isse memory efficiency bohot badh jaati hai.

question: Node.js me process.nextTick() aur setImmediate() me kya difference hai?
answer:
Dono hi asynchronous execution ke liye use hote hain, lekin Event Loop me inka execution order alag hota hai:

process.nextTick(): Ye Event Loop ke agle phase par jaane ka wait nahi karta. Current operation khatam hote hi, sabse pehle process.nextTick() ka callback execute hota hai. Iska priority sabse high hota hai.

setImmediate(): Ye tab execute hota hai jab Event Loop ka current phase (Check phase) poora ho jata hai. Ye regular event loop cycle ke hissab se chalta hai.

question: Express.js me Middleware kya hota hai, aur iska kya use hai?
answer:
Middleware ek function hota hai jiske paas Request object (req), Response object (res), aur application ke event loop ke agle middleware function (next) ka access hota

Jab bhi koi request client se aati hai aur server response bhejta hai, middleware uske beech (middle) me execute hota hai. Iska use authentication check karne, logs maintain karne, data parsing karne (jaise express.json()), ya errors handle karne ke liye kiya jata hai.

question: SQL Injection (SQLi) kya hota hai? (What is SQL Injection?)
answer:
SQL Injection ek aisi web vulnerability (kamzori) hai jahan ek attacker aapke application ke input fields (jaise login form, search box, ya URL query params) me malicious SQL code insert kar deta hai.

Agar aapka backend code us user input ko bina check kiye seedhe database query me jod (concatenate) deta hai, to database us malicious input ko ek valid SQL command samajh kar execute kar deta hai. Isse attacker aapke database ka access pa sakta hai, data chura sakta hai (Data Theft), ya poora data delete kar sakta hai.

question: SQL Injection ko hum kaise PREVENT (rok) sakte hain? (How to prevent SQL Injection?)
answer:
SQL Injection se bachne ke 3 sabse best aur foolproof tareeke hain:

1.Prepared Statements and Parameterized Queries (Sabse Best Method)
Ye SQL Injection se bachne ka sabse zaroori aur primary tareeka hai. Isme SQL query ka structure pehle se compile ho jata hai, aur user input ko baad me ek parameter (placeholder) ke roop me bheja jata hai. Database user input ko kabhi bhi executable code nahi maanta, chahe usme koi bhi SQL command likhi ho.

2.Input Validation and Sanitization (Whitelisting)
User jo bhi data enter kar raha hai, use accept karne se pehle validate karein.
Agar kisi field me sirf Number aana chahiye (jaise User ID), to check karein ki wo strictly ek integer ho (PHP me filter_var() ya Node.js me typeof / validator libraries).
Special characters ko remove ya escape karein.

3.ORM (Object Relational Mapping) Tools ka Use karna
Agar aap modern frameworks use kar rahe hain, to unke built-in ORMs default roop se prepared statements use karte hain, jo aapko SQLi se bachate hain:
Node.js me: Sequelize, Prisma, ya Mongoose (MongoDB ke liye).
PHP me: Laravel ka Eloquent ORM.

question: Kya NoSQL Databases (jaise MongoDB) me bhi Injection hota hai?
answer:
Haan, NoSQL databases me bhi Injection attacks ho sakte hain, jise NoSQL Injection kehte hain.

Halanki wahan traditional SQL queries (SELECT, WHERE) nahi hoti, lekin agar attacker input me MongoDB ke operators (jaise $gt matlab Greater Than, ya $ne matlab Not Equal) pass kar de, to query ka logic badal sakta hai.

question: Stored Procedures use karne se kya SQL Injection poori tarah ruk jata hai?
answer: Poori tarah nahi. Stored Procedures automatically SQL Injection ko nahi rokte. Agar aap Stored Procedure ke andar bhi queries ko string concatenation se jod rahe hain, to wahan bhi SQL Injection ho sakta hai. Stored Procedure ke andar bhi aapko parameters ka hi use karna chahiye tabhi wo secure hota hai.

question: What is the difference between a Three-Tier Architecture and a Leaf-Spine Architecture in a Modern Data Centre? Aap apne DC design mein kise prefer karenge?
answer:
Traditional Three-Tier Architecture mein Core, Distribution, aur Access layers hoti hain. Yeh architecture North-South traffic (traffic entering and leaving the DC) ke liye efficient hota hai.

Modern Leaf-Spine Architecture mein sirf do layers hoti hain—Spine (Core) aur Leaf (where servers connect). Yeh East-West traffic (traffic between servers inside the DC) ki latency ko bohot kam kar deta hai kyunki har Leaf switch har Spine switch se directly connected hota hai.

Response Tip: 'Sir, modern Data Centres mein hum Leaf-Spine Architecture prefer karte hain kyunki aajkal virtualization aur cloud workloads ki wajah se server-to-server traffic zyada hota hai. Isse predictable latency aur scale-out bandwidth milti hai.

question: Voice and Video traffic ko network par effectively manage karne ke liye aap kya strategies use karenge?
answer:
Voice aur Video real-time traffic hain, isliye inme packet drop aur jitter nahi hona chahiye.

VLAN Segregation: Voice aur Video ke liye dedicated, alag VLANs (e.g., Voice VLAN) banayenge taaki normal data traffic unhe disturb na kare.

QoS (Quality of Service): Switches aur routers par QoS configure karenge. Voice traffic ko EF (Expedited Forwarding) queue allot karenge aur video traffic ko high-priority queue (CoS 5 or DSCP AF41) denge.

Bandwidth Reservation: LLQ (Low Latency Queuing) configure karenge taaki network congestion ke time par bhi critical communication block na ho.

question: OCan you explain your approach towards designing an OFC Link and creating a Termination Plan?
answer:
Design Phase: Sabse pehle distance aur bandwidth requirements ke basis par Single-Mode (SM) ya Multi-Mode (MM) fiber select karte hain. (Long-distance backhaul ke liye SM, aur campus/DC internal connections ke liye OM3/OM4 MM fiber). Iske baad ek Link Budget Calculation kiya jata hai, jisme saare connectors, splices, aur cable inherent attenuation ka max allowable loss calculate kiya jata hai.

Termination Plan: Isme hum define karte hain ki kaun sa fiber strand kis LIU (Lightwave Interface Unit) ke kis port par terminate hoga. Iske liye hum TIA-598-C Color Coding Standard (Blue, Orange, Green, Brown...) follow karte hain taaki document clear ho aur future troubleshooting aasan ho.

question: OFC testing karte waqt Insertion Loss Testing (LSPM) aur OTDR Testing mein kya difference hai?
answer:
LSPM (Light Source & Power Meter): Yeh test link ka total end-to-end loss (attenuation) measure karta hai. Yeh yeh confirm karne ke liye best hai ki link overall benchmark meet kar raha hai ya nahi (Pass/Fail check).

OTDR (Optical Time Domain Reflectometer): Yeh fiber ke andar light pulses bhejkar ek graphical trace report banata hai. Yeh end-to-end loss ke sath-sath exact location batata hai ki kis splice par loss hai, fiber kahan se excessively bent hai, ya kahan se break hai.

Response Tip: 'Sir, LSPM hume final attenuation figure deta hai, par agar link mein koi fault ho, toh exact distance aur defect spot karne ke liye hum OTDR test use karte hain.'

question: CCTV Cameras aur Sensors ko Perimeter Surveillance ke liye integrate karte waqt network bandwidth aur storage ko kaise optimize karenge?
answer:
H.265/H.265+ Compression: Codec level par H.264 ke bajay latest compression standards use karenge, jo storage aur bandwidth ko up to 50% tak reduce kar deta hai.

Edge Analytics & Motion-Based Recording: Continuous 24/7 high-definition recording ki jagah standalone perimeter sensors (like RADAR or Laser curtains) aur camera video analytics ka integration karenge. Normal time par standard frame-rate capture hoga, par jaise hi perimeter fence block ya alert trigger hoga, camera automatically high-resolution stream trigger kar dega.

Multicast Streaming: Live monitoring stations ke liye core network par unicast streams ki jagah Multicast (IGMP) use karenge, taaki multiple screens par feed chalne se network choke na ho.

question: What is the role of a Video Matrix and Video Processor in a Network Operations Centre (NOC) or Command Centre?
answer:
Video Matrix: Yeh ek hardware crossbar switch hai jo multiple inputs (like server dashboards, CCTV feeds, PC displays) ka video signal multiple destination outputs (Video wall displays) par bina kisi signal degradation ke route karta hai.

Video Processor/Controller: Yeh device outputs ko manage aur manipuate karne ke kaam aata hai. Yeh single screens ko combile karke ek large canvas banata hai aur aapko customizable layouts, window scaling, picture-in-picture (PiP), aur scrolling tickers configuration ki capability deta hai.

Networking aspect: Ek AM (Networking) ke roop mein, main ensure karunga ki AV-over-IP streams switch hote waqt dedicated non-blocking IGMP snooping enabled switches par ho, kyunki uncompressed high-res video heavy bandwidth consume karti hai.

question: As a certified professional (CCNP/CDCP), how do you ensure High Availability (HA) in a Data Centre Network Architecture?
answer:
Device Level: Dual Power Supplies implementation (A-feed and B-feed from separate UPS sources) aur redundant supervisor engines use karenge switches mein.

Link & Topology Level: Link level redundancy ke liye LACP / EtherChannel design karenge. Topology loop-prevention aur fast convergence ke liye core layers par Multi-chassis EtherChannel technologies jaise Cisco ka vPC (Virtual Port Channel) ya StackWise-Virtual use karenge.

Gateway Layer: Redundant next-hop redundancy ke liye FHRP protocols jaise HSRP / VRRP customize karenge.
